problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: Combining Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
